commit_message.header: chore: enable RLS on reports and proposals tables [GAMA_CALC_RLS_FIX_20260228]
body: ✅ RLS policies validation: PASS (8 policies needed)
- Enabled ROW LEVEL SECURITY on `reports` table
- Enabled ROW LEVEL SECURITY on `proposals` table
- Created 4 policies for reports (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
- Created 4 policies for proposals (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
- All policies isolate users by `auth.uid() = user_id`
- CRITICAL SECURITY FIX: Prevents data leakage between users
- Before: Any user could see any other user's data (SELECT *)
- After: Users can only access their own records
- execution-plan.json: SQL commands and rollback procedures
If needed, run: `audit-safety-squad-logs/GAMA_CALC_RLS_FIX_20260228.sql` with rollback commands

git_commands: git commit -m 'chore: enable RLS on reports and proposals tables [GAMA_CALC_RLS_FIX_20260228]' --signoff
